prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains specifically to the Planning Inspectorate in England, which operates under the jurisdiction of the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government. It does not cover aspects relevant to Scotland, as planning and local governance are devolved matters in the UK.
